common.feature-disabled: ⚠ The `{{featureKey}}` feature is disabled in this server.

system.no-manual: No behaviors are available via DM.
system.cannot-load-manual: ⚠ Could not load behavior list, please try again later.
system.continuous-dm-warning: ⚠ This behavior runs as continuous-forward but the bot couldn't open a DM with you. Please allow server / app DMs in your Discord privacy settings and try again.

group.remove-description: Delete an emoji group (and its mappings)
group.list-description: List emoji groups and their mappings

command.add-description: Add an emoji→role mapping into a group
command.remove-description: Remove an emoji→role mapping from a group
command.watch-description: Watch a message and apply a group's emoji→role mappings to it

option.name: group name
option.group-with-default: group name (defaults to "{{default}}", auto-created if missing)

mapping.already: {{emoji}} is already mapped to `{{roleName}}` in this group.

watch.message-not-found: Message `{{messageId}}` does not exist or isn't accessible in this channel.
watch.bound: Message `{{messageId}}` is now bound to group `{{group}}`.
watch.watching: Message `{{messageId}}` is being watched with group `{{group}}`.
watch.stopped: Message `{{messageId}}` is no longer being watched.

command.watch-description: Watch this channel as a picture-only channel
command.stop-watch-description: Stop watching this channel as a picture-only channel

watch.added: The current channel is being watched.
watch.already: Current channel is already in the watch list.
watch.removed: Current channel is no longer being watched.
watch.not-watched: Current channel is not being watched.

command.watch-description: Watch this channel as a todo list
command.stop-watch-description: Stop watching this channel as a todo list
command.check-cache-description: Check the cache for todo messages

watch.already: Current channel is already being watched.
watch.removed: Current channel is no longer being watched.
watch.not-watched: Current channel is not being watched.

command.watch-description: Watch this channel as a RCON forward channel
command.stop-watch-description: Stop watching this channel as a RCON forward channel

modal.title: RCON forward channel
modal.password-placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current password

watch.already: Current channel is already in the watch list.
watch.removed: Current channel is no longer being watched.
watch.not-watched: Current channel is not being watched.

command.join-description: Have the bot join your current voice channel
command.leave-description: Have the bot leave the voice channel
command.play-description: Play an audio URL (direct mp3/opus/HLS or other ffmpeg-decodable formats)

voice.guild-only: This command can only be used in a server.
voice.no-voice-channel: Please join a voice channel first.
voice.cap-reached: ⚠ This bot has reached its voice-connection limit; please try again later.
voice.not-joined: Not in a voice channel — use `/voice join` first.
voice.ffmpeg-missing: ffmpeg is unavailable; voice playback disabled.
